name: shopcalc
title: ShopCalc
description: Woodworking calculators for spacing, conversions, cut lists, and joint angles
author: bnjmn

preferences.name: kerfWidth
preferences.title: Default Kerf Width
preferences.description: Blade kerf in inches (for example 0.125 for 1/8")

commands.name: quick-convert
commands.title: Quick Convert
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Natural-language style unit conversion from one expression

commands.name: guided-start
commands.title: Guided Start
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Start with plain-language tasks and jump to the right calculator

commands.name: spacing
commands.title: Spacing Calculator
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Calculate equal spacing for slats, dados, dowels, or repeating elements

commands.name: convert
commands.title: Unit Converter
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Convert between mm/cm and inches with fractional display

commands.name: cutlist
commands.title: Cut List Calculator
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Calculate board count, sheet yield, and waste for a project

commands.name: angle
commands.title: Joint Angle Calculator
commands.subtitle: ShopCalc
commands.description: Calculate miter, bevel, and compound angles for joints

tools.name: calculate-spacing
tools.title: Calculate Spacing
tools.description: Calculate equal spacing for slats, dados, dowels, or repeating elements and return exact positions and a visual diagram.

tools.name: convert-units
tools.title: Convert Units
tools.description: Convert between millimeters, centimeters, and inches with decimal and fractional output.

tools.name: calculate-cutlist
tools.title: Calculate Cut List
tools.description: Estimate board or sheet usage with kerf compensation, waste, and layout output.

tools.name: calculate-angle
tools.title: Calculate Joint Angle
tools.description: Calculate miter, bevel, polygon, and stair-rail joint angles.

ai.instructions: ShopCalc is a woodworking calculator. Use tools for spacing, conversion, cut lists, and angle tasks. Include decimal millimeter and centimeter values and fractional inch values where relevant. For spacing output, include a readable position diagram. Default to inches unless the user explicitly requests metric.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
